task_completion.description: Navigate to the Accounts tab in NinjaTrader 8
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader 8 Control Center window is open and the 'Accounts' tab is selected at the bottom of the window.

task_completion.description: Open the Edit Account dialog for Sim101
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Edit Account' or properties dialog specifically for the 'Sim101' account is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the Initial Cash balance to 50,000
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Initial cash' field in the Edit Account dialog or the 'Initial Cash' column in the Accounts grid displays '50,000' or '50000'.

task_completion.description: Initiate the export of the Accounts grid
task_completion.visual_evidence: A right-click context menu showing 'Export' is visible over the Accounts grid, or a 'Save As' dialog originating from NinjaTrader is open.

task_completion.description: Save the exported grid as current_accounts.csv in the Documents folder
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog shows the file name 'current_accounts.csv' and the address bar or directory tree indicates the path is 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The NinjaTrader 8 application interface is clearly visible and interacted with. The agent did not use a terminal or script to modify internal configuration files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the export was performed via the NinjaTrader GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The export is performed using NinjaTrader's built-in export functionality (e.g., right-click -> Export), rather than manually creating a CSV file using command-line tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually type the CSV contents
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent does not open a text editor (like Notepad) to manually type the account details and save it as the target CSV file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target account is 'Sim101', which is the default simulation account in NinjaTrader 8. The target balance is 50000 (visually formatted as '50,000' or '50,000.00'). The expected output path for the export is 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\current_accounts.csv'. In NinjaTrader 8, accounts can be edited by right-clicking them in the Accounts tab and selecting 'Edit Account'. The grid can be exported to CSV by right-clicking the grid and selecting 'Export'.
